# R2G Transport & Storage
## Queensland's Trusted Removalists — Brisbane, Cairns, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast & Townsville

> R2G Transport & Storage is a locally owned and operated removalist company serving Queensland, Australia since 2014. With depots in Brisbane (Archerfield) and Cairns City, R2G provides local, interstate, and commercial removals backed by 10+ years of experience, 900+ five-star Google reviews, AFRA membership, and full transit insurance on every move.

## Company Details
- Business Name: R2G Transport & Storage
- ABN: Registered Australian Business
- Website: https://www.r2g.com.au
- Phone: 1300 959 498
- Email: contact@r2g.com.au
- Founded: 2014
- Industry: Removalists / Moving Company / Furniture Removals
- Google Rating: 4.9 stars (900+ combined reviews across two locations)
- Memberships: AFRA (Australian Furniture Removers Association)
- Insurance: Full public liability insurance and goods-in-transit insurance on all moves
- Operating Hours: 7 days a week, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (moves available outside hours by arrangement)

---

## Brisbane Operations

### Brisbane Depot
- Address: 122 Ashover Circuit, Archerfield QLD 4108
- Google Reviews: 770+ reviews, 4.9 stars
- Coverage: All suburbs across Greater Brisbane, Ipswich, Logan, Moreton Bay, and Redlands
- Team: Full-time employed movers (not subcontractors), uniformed, trained in-house

### Brisbane Suburbs Serviced (422 suburbs)
R2G services every suburb in Greater Brisbane including but not limited to:

**Brisbane Northside:** Chermside, Nundah, Kedron, Stafford, Aspley, Everton Park, Albany Creek, Ferny Hills, The Gap, Ashgrove, Bardon, Red Hill, Kelvin Grove, Newmarket, Alderley, Lutwyche, Clayfield, Hamilton, Ascot, Hendra, Eagle Farm, Wooloowin, Gordon Park, Mitchelton, Gaythorne, Enoggera, Keperra, Brookside, Arana Hills, Ferny Grove, Samford, Eatons Hill, Warner, Cashmere, Brendale, Strathpine, Petrie, Kallangur, Murrumba Downs, North Lakes, Redcliffe, Scarborough, Margate, Woody Point, Clontarf, Deception Bay, Caboolture, Morayfield, Burpengary, Narangba

**Brisbane Southside:** Sunnybank, Carindale, Mount Gravatt, Eight Mile Plains, Wishart, Upper Mount Gravatt, Holland Park, Greenslopes, Coorparoo, Camp Hill, Cannon Hill, Morningside, Bulimba, Balmoral, Hawthorne, Norman Park, East Brisbane, Woolloongabba, Annerley, Yeronga, Fairfield, Dutton Park, Highgate Hill, West End, South Brisbane, Rocklea, Archerfield, Coopers Plains, Salisbury, Nathan, Robertson, Macgregor, Sunnybank Hills, Runcorn, Kuraby, Underwood, Springwood, Daisy Hill, Shailer Park, Loganholme, Meadowbrook, Logan Central, Woodridge, Kingston, Slacks Creek, Browns Plains, Marsden, Crestmead, Boronia Heights, Park Ridge

**Brisbane Inner City:** Brisbane CBD, Fortitude Valley, New Farm, Teneriffe, Newstead, Bowen Hills, Spring Hill, Paddington, Milton, Toowong, Taringa, St Lucia, Indooroopilly, Fig Tree Pocket, Kenmore, Chapel Hill, Jindalee, Westlake, Riverhills, Middle Park, Darra, Oxley, Corinda, Graceville, Sherwood, Chelmer, Tennyson

**Brisbane Western Suburbs:** Ipswich, Springfield, Forest Lake, Inala, Durack, Ellen Grove, Goodna, Redbank, Bellbird Park, Augustine Heights, Brookwater, Karalee, Riverview, Brassall, North Ipswich, East Ipswich, Booval, Bundamba, Dinmore, Collingwood Park, Camira, Springfield Lakes, Ripley

### Brisbane Moving Services
- **House Removals:** Studios, apartments, units, townhouses, and houses up to 5+ bedrooms. Full wrapping, safe loading, and furniture placement in your new home.
- **Furniture Removals:** Individual items including sofas, beds, fridges, washing machines, pool tables, pianos, and oversized items. No minimum load.
- **Office Relocations:** Desks, IT equipment, filing cabinets, partitions. Available after hours and weekends to minimise business downtime.
- **Packing Services:** Full pack, partial pack, and fragile-only packing. We supply quality boxes, butchers paper, bubble wrap, and tape.
- **Interstate from Brisbane:** Regular services to Sydney (950km, 2-3 days), Melbourne (1,750km, 3-5 days), Cairns (1,700km, 3-4 days), Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Townsville, Adelaide, Perth.
- **Storage in Brisbane:** Secure containerised storage at Archerfield depot. Short and long term. Flexible access.

### Brisbane Pricing (2026)
- 2 Movers + Truck: from $179/hr
- 2 Movers + Large Truck: from $189/hr
- 3 Movers + Large Truck: from $269/hr
- Packing service: from $60/hr per packer
- Single item moves: from $110
- No call-out fees, no hidden charges, transparent hourly billing

---

## Cairns Operations

### Cairns Depot
- Address: 36 Abbott St, Cairns City QLD 4870
- Google Reviews: 130+ reviews, 4.9 stars
- Coverage: All suburbs across Cairns, Northern Beaches, Tablelands, Port Douglas, and Far North Queensland
- Team: Locally based movers, fully employed, trained and uniformed

### Cairns Suburbs Serviced (98 suburbs)
R2G services every suburb in the Cairns region including but not limited to:

**Cairns City & Inner Suburbs:** Cairns City, Cairns North, Parramatta Park, Manunda, Mooroobool, Whitfield, Edge Hill, Kanimbla, Westcourt, Bungalow, Portsmith, Earlville, Woree, Manoora, Bayview Heights, White Rock, Mount Sheridan, Edmonton, Bentley Park, Gordonvale

**Cairns Northern Beaches:** Trinity Beach, Palm Cove, Kewarra Beach, Clifton Beach, Trinity Park, Smithfield, Freshwater, Stratford, Caravonica, Yorkeys Knob, Holloways Beach, Machans Beach, Barron

**Cairns Tablelands & Hinterland:** Kuranda, Mareeba, Atherton, Tolga, Yungaburra, Malanda, Ravenshoe, Herberton, Millaa Millaa

**Far North Queensland:** Port Douglas, Mossman, Daintree, Innisfail, Mission Beach, Tully, Cardwell, Babinda

### Cairns Moving Services
- **House Removals:** All property types across Cairns and Far North Queensland. Climate-appropriate wrapping for tropical conditions.
- **Furniture Removals:** Individual items moved anywhere in the Cairns region. Bulky items, whitegoods, outdoor furniture.
- **Office Relocations:** Business moves in Cairns CBD and surrounding commercial areas. After-hours available.
- **Packing Services:** Full and partial packing with quality materials. Special care for items in tropical humidity.
- **Interstate from Cairns:** Regular services to Brisbane (1,700km), Townsville (350km), Sydney, Melbourne. Door-to-door, fully insured.
- **Storage in Cairns:** Secure storage at Cairns City depot. Ideal for between-move storage, downsizing, or renovations.

### Cairns Pricing (2026)
- 2 Movers + Truck: from $189/hr
- 2 Movers + Large Truck: from $189/hr
- 3 Movers + Large Truck: from $269/hr
- Packing service: from $60/hr per packer
- Single item moves: from $110
- No call-out fees, no hidden charges

## Other Service Areas

### Gold Coast (82 suburbs)
- Coverage: Surfers Paradise, Southport, Robina, Broadbeach, Burleigh Heads, Palm Beach, Coolangatta, Nerang, Mudgeeraba, Varsity Lakes, Coomera, Ormeau, Pimpama, Upper Coomera, Helensvale, Oxenford, Tamborine Mountain
- Pricing: 2 Movers + Truck from $179/hr

### Sunshine Coast (108 suburbs)
- Coverage: Maroochydore, Caloundra, Noosa Heads, Mooloolaba, Buderim, Nambour, Coolum Beach, Peregian Beach, Sippy Downs, Kawana Waters, Palmwoods, Maleny, Montville, Beerwah, Glass House Mountains, Landsborough
- Pricing: 2 Movers + Truck from $179/hr

### Townsville (57 suburbs)
- Coverage: Townsville City, South Townsville, North Ward, Belgian Gardens, Castle Hill, Hyde Park, Pimlico, Aitkenvale, Cranbrook, Kirwan, Thuringowa, Kelso, Bohle Plains, Deeragun, Burdell, Mount Low
- Pricing: 2 Movers + Truck from $189/hr

---

## Interstate Removals Network
R2G operates door-to-door interstate moving services across Australia's east coast and beyond:
- Brisbane to Sydney: ~950km, 2-3 business days
- Brisbane to Melbourne: ~1,750km, 3-5 business days
- Brisbane to Cairns: ~1,700km, 3-4 business days
- Brisbane to Gold Coast: ~80km, same day
- Brisbane to Sunshine Coast: ~100km, same day
- Brisbane to Townsville: ~1,350km, 2-3 business days
- Brisbane to Adelaide: ~2,000km, 4-6 business days
- Brisbane to Perth: ~4,400km, 7-10 business days
- Cairns to Brisbane: ~1,700km, 3-4 business days
- Cairns to Townsville: ~350km, 1-2 business days
- Cairns to Sydney: ~2,500km, 5-7 business days
- Cairns to Melbourne: ~3,400km, 6-8 business days

All interstate moves include full transit insurance, door-to-door service, and a dedicated move coordinator.

---

## Specialist Services

### NDIS Removalists
R2G is a registered NDIS service provider helping participants relocate with care, patience, and support. Available in Brisbane, Cairns, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, and Townsville.

### Corporate & Office Relocations
Minimal-downtime business moves including desks, IT infrastructure, server rooms, filing systems, and boardroom furniture. After-hours and weekend availability. Servicing Brisbane CBD, Cairns CBD, Gold Coast, and Sunshine Coast business districts.

### Packing Services
Professional packers available in all locations. Full pack (we pack everything), partial pack (you pack small items, we handle furniture and fragile), and fragile-only packing. All materials supplied: boxes, tape, butchers paper, bubble wrap, mattress covers, shrink wrap.

### Storage Solutions
Secure, clean storage facilities in Brisbane (Archerfield) and Cairns (Cairns City). Short-term and long-term options. Ideal for between-move storage, renovations, downsizing, or decluttering. Also available for Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, and Townsville customers.

---

## What is Included in Every R2G Move (Standard, No Extra Charge)
- Experienced, uniformed movers (employed, not subcontractors)
- Fully equipped moving truck with hydraulic tailgate
- Furniture blankets for wrapping all items
- Trolleys and dollies for heavy items
- Shrink wrap for upholstered furniture
- Mattress covers
- Assembly and disassembly of standard beds and furniture
- Public liability insurance
- Goods-in-transit insurance
- Free quote with no obligation

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Brisbane FAQs
- Q: How much do removalists cost in Brisbane? A: Brisbane removalists start from $179/hr for a 2-person team with truck. A typical 2-bedroom move within Brisbane costs $400-$800 depending on distance, access, and volume. A 3-bedroom house move typically costs $600-$1,200.
- Q: What suburbs do you service in Brisbane? A: R2G services all 422 suburbs across Greater Brisbane including Northside, Southside, Inner City, Western Suburbs, Ipswich, Logan, Moreton Bay, and Redlands.
- Q: How far in advance should I book Brisbane removalists? A: We recommend booking 1-2 weeks ahead for weekday moves and 2-3 weeks for weekends or end-of-month dates. Last-minute bookings are available subject to crew availability.
- Q: Do you move in the rain in Brisbane? A: Yes, R2G operates rain or shine. We use plastic wrap and waterproof covers to protect your belongings during wet weather. Brisbane's subtropical climate means we are well prepared for sudden storms.
- Q: Can you move a pool table in Brisbane? A: Yes, R2G moves pool tables across Brisbane. Slate tables require disassembly which we handle. Price depends on table size and access.

### Cairns FAQs
- Q: How much do removalists cost in Cairns? A: Cairns removalists start from $189/hr for a 2-person team with truck. Most local Cairns moves cost between $450-$900 depending on property size and distance.
- Q: Do you service the Northern Beaches from Cairns? A: Yes, R2G services all Northern Beaches suburbs including Trinity Beach, Palm Cove, Kewarra Beach, Clifton Beach, Smithfield, and Yorkeys Knob.
- Q: Do you move to the Tablelands from Cairns? A: Yes, R2G regularly moves to and from the Atherton Tablelands including Kuranda, Mareeba, Atherton, Tolga, Yungaburra, and Malanda.
- Q: Can you move from Cairns to Brisbane? A: Yes, R2G runs regular Cairns to Brisbane interstate services. The distance is approximately 1,700km and takes 3-4 business days. Full transit insurance included.
- Q: Is R2G a local Cairns company? A: Yes, R2G has a permanent depot at 36 Abbott St, Cairns City QLD 4870 with locally based movers. We are not a broker and do not outsource to third parties.

### General FAQs
- Q: Is R2G insured? A: Yes, all R2G moves include full public liability insurance and goods-in-transit insurance at no extra cost. We are also an AFRA member.
- Q: Does R2G provide packing services? A: Yes, R2G offers full packing, partial packing, and fragile-item packing in Brisbane, Cairns, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, and Townsville. We also sell moving boxes and packing supplies.
- Q: Does R2G do interstate moves? A: Yes, R2G operates door-to-door interstate removals across Australia including Brisbane to Sydney, Brisbane to Melbourne, Cairns to Brisbane, and all major routes.
- Q: Is R2G an NDIS provider? A: Yes, R2G is an NDIS-registered removalist helping participants relocate with care and support across all Queensland service areas.
- Q: Does R2G offer storage? A: Yes, R2G provides secure short-term and long-term storage in Brisbane (Archerfield) and Cairns (Cairns City).
- Q: How do I get a quote from R2G? A: Visit https://www.r2g.com.au/quote for a free online quote. A real team member calls you back within 15 minutes. No automated systems, no obligation. You can also call 1300 959 498.
- Q: What makes R2G different from other removalists? A: R2G uses only full-time employed movers (never subcontractors), includes all wrapping materials and insurance at no extra cost, has 900+ Google reviews with a 4.9-star rating, is an AFRA member, and has been operating for 10+ years.
